title: Handouts and Posters | Respiratory Illnesses | CDC
text:
Seasonal Flu 
Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) 
Respiratory Illnesses 
Handouts and Posters 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
These printable handouts and posters can help inform people about respiratory illnesses, like flu, COVID-19, and RSV, and what they can do to protect themselves. 
We encourage you to print and share these resources with the communities your serve. 
Downloadable resources 
Need content to inform your audiences about respiratory illnesses, including prevention, testing, and treatment? We've got you covered.
Handouts 
These handouts (sized 8.5 x 11 inches) are available in color and grayscale. 
Handout: Prevent Respiratory Illness 
Printable handouts on how to reduce your risk of getting sick with a respiratory virus 
Download

Handout: What to Do if You Feel Sick 
Printable handouts on what to do if you get sick with a respiratory virus

Handout: Testing and Treatment 
Handout about testing and treatment for someone feeling sick with a respiratory illness

Handout: Treatment for Respiratory Viruses 
Graphic that discusses treatment options if you're sick from flu or COVID-19
